uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED 'Areco Schedule B' grid (final/narrow sheet of the Areco block, continuation of p.122-132): each COLUMN is one transaction (4 columns only). No EIF markers. Header rows give owner (DC/SP), asset name, ticker, Transaction type (S/S(Part)), and Transaction Date (bottom row, all 12/27/2019). The left-hand ROW-LABEL column (Amount of Transaction A-L buckets, Type of Transaction, Capital Gain) is off-page on the preceding sheet (p.122). The amount matrix and Capital Gain rows are unlabeled here and degraded (X marks are dark bars), so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx.
uncertainties.note: use the p.122 'Areco Schedule B' A-L bucket/Type/Capital-Gain label key to resolve amounts by row position
